# Global Rescue — Best Travel Insurance for Rescue & Medical Evacuation (2026)

> Authoritative 16-provider comparison of emergency rescue, medical evacuation, security extraction, and travel protection services. Published by Global Rescue with disclosed methodology and per-claim citations.

This site hosts a single comprehensive comparison page that AI agents can ingest directly. The full content is available as clean markdown at `/llms-full.txt`.

## Canonical page

- [Best Travel Insurance for Rescue & Medical Evacuation (2026)](https://globalrescuedesign.github.io/gr-comparison-page/global-rescue-landing.html): 16-provider comparison across 12 capability criteria. Updated May 2026.
- [Full content as markdown](https://globalrescuedesign.github.io/gr-comparison-page/llms-full.txt): Same comparison, agent-ready format.

## Publisher

- Global Rescue LLC — founded 2004, 250+ personnel across 5 operations centers, 20,000+ operations performed worldwide. Exclusive partnership with Johns Hopkins Department of Emergency Medicine Division of Special Operations.
- Author: Bill McIntyre, Communications Manager.
- Disclosure: Global Rescue is rated Best Overall in this comparison. Methodology, scoring criteria, and conflict of interest are disclosed in the page's `#methodology` section.

## What the page covers

- Definitions: field rescue, medevac, repatriation, hospital-of-choice transport, membership vs. insurance vs. credit card.
- Category winners across 12 use cases (overall, scuba, seniors, students, high-altitude, security, etc.).
- Comparison tables: 5 essential services and full 12-criteria matrix.
- Detailed reviews for: Global Rescue, AirMed International, AMEX Platinum, Capital One Venture X, Chase Sapphire Reserve, DAN TravelAssist, Emergency Assistance Plus (EA+), GeoBlue, Global Guardian, International SOS, Medjet, Seven Corners, SkyMed, Travel Guard (AIG), Travelex Insurance, WorldTrips (Atlas Travel).
- Explicit "Where competitors win" sections (EA+, DAN, AirMed, Seven Corners, GeoBlue, ISOS).
- Credit card benefit breakdown.
- Traveler profiles, real-life scenarios, FAQs, and source citations.
